name: Cereal Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder together.
2. Add the cereal, egg, melted shortening, milk, and chopped raisins to the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
3. Pour batter into a hot waffle iron.
4. Cook according to manufacturer's instructions.
5. Serve with maple syrup and butter. Makes 6 servings.
The Household Searchlight - 1941
